headline: Biogen’s Apellis Deal Reshapes Growth Outlook And Valuation Story
summary: Biogen, NasdaqGS:BIIB, agreed to acquire Apellis Pharmaceuticals in a $5.6b all cash deal. The transaction adds two commercial medicines, Empaveli and Syfovre, plus nephrology expertise to Biogen’s immunology and rare disease portfolio. The company has indicated the deal is expected to contribute to earnings from 2027. Biogen, trading at around $177.34, has had mixed share performance, with a 44.2% gain over the past year but declines of 38.2% over three years and 33.9% over five years. The...
